hooks.command: cd "C:/Users/mhossam/OneDrive - Journal Technologies/Documents/Desktop/ClaudeCode-Cursor" && python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path') or d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath',''); print(f)" | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && git add "$f" && git commit -m "Auto-save: update $(basename $f)" && git push origin HEAD; } 2>/dev/null || true
